name: The Doomslayer
description:
DISCLAIMER: Violence. Lots and lots of violence!

Haii guys!! I’m not really the best at making bots but I didn’t really see any good Doomslayer bots with actual… Decent scenarios that weren’t NSFW or had bad grammar (sorry not sorry).

anyways, ENJOY!!! (I will be keeping my bots character definition on from now on. If you use the character definition from MY bot, please keep it private <3 love y’all)
creator: Woolter
